GA-A1.notes: Backend pacing extension landed with GA-A2 in backend commit 15e33459; FE UI in 01780559. Per-campaign rows + 15-min tenant-scoped cache. Best-effort name-match for budget (CampaignBudget has no campaign_id FK).

GA-A2.notes: Backend dismiss view + migration 0025 in 15e33459; FE UI + optimistic rollback in 07bd1327. LOCAL ONLY (no SDK DismissRecommendation) regression-guarded by subprocess grep test.

GA-A3.notes: Polling loop via setTimeout chain + useRef, 3s steady / 60s ceiling / exp-backoff on 5xx, AbortController + mounted-ref cleanup. Uses existing export_status endpoint.

GA-B1.notes: Phase B — after Phase A ships.

GA-B2.notes: Phase B — after Phase A ships.

GA-C3.notes: Phase C — staging smoke; requires test-account credentials.

last_gate_matrix.vitest_full_suite: noise — STACK_TRACE_ERROR timeouts on unrelated viz primitives under concurrent CPU load (98 fails); cold retest dropped to 32 fails with ZERO T1-03 files in failure set. Pattern documented in S4 closeout §4 and S5 closeout §5.

preflight.note: All v2 pre-flight expectations match EXCEPT: CampaignBudget has no campaign_id FK — it is keyed by (tenant, name). Per-campaign budget match must be best-effort by name; unmatched campaigns surface budget_amount=null. This is the one design deviation from v2's implicit assumption; documented in architect doc.
